## Summary

One or two sentences on what this change does and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Build / tooling

## Testing

- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npx tsc -b` passes
- [ ] `cargo check` passes (if Rust changed)
- [ ] Manually exercised in `./scripts/dev-instance.sh`

## Screenshots

For UI changes, include before/after screenshots or a short clip.

## Notes for reviewers

Anything reviewers should pay particular attention to, follow-up work
deferred, or context that isn't obvious from the diff.
